items.title: Celtic linked with Tahirovic as Reynolds attracts Rangers - gossip
items.summary: Midfielder linked with Celtic as Rangers look at right-back while Dundee United face competition for winger.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Hardik Pandya ruled out of Afghanistan ODI series due to quadriceps strain
items.summary: With three weeks for recovery, there is absolutely no chance of him playing the ODI series as his rehabilitation will not be complete, says a source from BCCI
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Australia seek response as Bangladesh close in on landmark series win
items.summary: Confident hosts will hope for another complete performance as they eye a maiden ODI series win against Australia
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
